name: QA 220
description:
PCP QA Test No. 220

Does primary logger die and cleanup when pmcd exits?



Copyright (c) 1995-2002 Silicon Graphics, Inc.  All Rights Reserved.

PCP QA Test No. 220

Does primary logger die and cleanup when pmcd exits?
